title: Otherside
description: Otherside modpack created on the basis of Fabulously Optimized, combining optimization, visuals and convenient functions for SMP Otherside.
body:
Otherside modpack created on the basis of Fabulously Optimized, combining optimization, visuals and convenient functions for SMP Otherside.

This modpack is created exclusively for the private server Otherside and is not intended for use on other servers.
If you wish to use this modpack on other servers, you will need to remove certain mods.
